purpose: Defines the canonical report-only task status and work-log synchronization rules for TODO files, project-register/agent-task-queue.json, project-register/progress-log.json, project-register/agent-work-log.json, Autopilot dry runs, Batch Autopilot dry runs, PR outcome recording, PR review, auto-merge reporting, and auto-repair reporting without rewriting files automatically or enabling merge/repair/deploy behavior.

canonicalStatusMarkers.meaning: Task is known and not started.
Task is actively being worked or intentionally reserved by an agent/session.
Task is completed with recorded evidence.
Task has useful completed parts but remaining scope or validation is explicit.
Task is blocked, unsafe, unclear, protected, or requires human review before continuing.
Task/source is no longer leading and must point to the current canonical source when possible.
Task/source duplicates another canonical item and must link or name that leading item when possible.

PRLinkRules.postCreationGuard: When a PR is created, record or explicitly defer PR URL/number, source branch, mergeability state, required check status, PR_POST_CREATION_GUARD_READY result, and next recommended action.

forbiddenAutoUpdates: Do not rewrite TODO files automatically in this first version.
Do not auto-update agent-task-queue.json statuses without explicit local-write tooling and human-reviewed output.
Do not modify runtime product code, protected compliance logic, Unity files, package manifests, public assets, Functions, Firestore Rules, or GitHub workflow files as part of this governance check.
humanReviewRequiredFor: real batch execution beyond report/check-only planning
protected path or protected topic changes
missing PR/check evidence on completed tasks
blocked tasks involving compliance, reward authority, mission completion authority, payment, wallet, token, NFT, health, child, location, privacy, legal, or Unity/PR #13 areas
new agent/register/workflow family proposal or ambiguous extension ownership

requiredTopLevelOutput: WellFit Task Status Work Log Sync Check
readyCriteria: policy JSON parses and includes required governance fields
TODO_INDEX.md and NEXT_ACTIONS.md contain only canonical status markers in task-list lines
completed current-format work-log entries include task, branch, changed-file, check-result, auto-merge, auto-repair, protected-area, follow-up, next-task, and timestamp/date evidence
progress entries either include or infer task IDs where applicable
blocked entries include blocker or human-review evidence
validator remains report-only and does not rewrite files

continuityDependencyRules.rule: When task work leaves open follow-ups, blocked dependencies, review_required points, or required next output files, preserve them in the Sentinel and reference the affected work/progress-log evidence.

agentExtensionPolicyRules.rule: Completed governance tasks that add or change agent capabilities must record whether the work was an existing-agent extension or a proposal-required new-agent topic.

agentCatalogApprovedBacklogRules.policy: Catalog/backlog status changes must preserve report-only evidence, PR checks, next recommended task, and human-review requirements for approved future agents.
